translation_notes: This is a regime-based risk management rule, not a traditional entry/exit signal. It modulates position-taking based on regime health indicated by ADX levels and volatility thresholds. GREEN regime (ADX > 18): accept all signals normally. YELLOW regime (ADX 12-18 OR volatility exceeds sma_20 by 40%): liquidate new entries, hold existing. RED regime (ADX < 12 OR volatility exceeds sma_20 by 65%): liquidate all positions within 1-2 bars. Implementation requires conditional logic wrapper that gates signal acceptance through regime state machine rather than direct entry/exit rules.
